secbridge.description: SecBridge multi-source syslog routing config. Add new sources here and run: sudo bash scripts/manage-sources.sh apply
notes: allowed_ips: list of IPs allowed to send syslog to this collector (empty = allow all)
syslog_port: each source MUST use a unique port if running on the same collector
protocol: udp or tcp or both
parser_script: path to the Python parser for this source
To add a new source: copy a source block above, change id/name/product/port, then run manage-sources.sh apply
